args: PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; ENV_FILE="$PROJECT_DIR/.env"; if [[ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then while IFS='=' read -r key rest; do [[ "$key" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] && continue; [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue; key=$(echo "$key" | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/[[:space:]]*$//'); value=$(echo "$rest" | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/#.*$//;s/[[:space:]]*$//'); [[ -n "$value" ]] && export "$key=$value" 2>/dev/null || true; done < "$ENV_FILE"; fi; if [[ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/.env.local" ]]; then while IFS='=' read -r key rest; do [[ "$key" =~ ^[[:space:]]*# ]] && continue; [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue; key=$(echo "$key" | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/[[:space:]]*$//'); value=$(echo "$rest" | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/#.*$//;s/[[:space:]]*$//'); [[ -n "$value" ]] && export "$key=$value" 2>/dev/null || true; done < "$PROJECT_DIR/.env.local"; fi; exec npx @kalera/munin-claude mcp
